---
title: "Schneirographs"
subtitle: "Three Numbers and One Equation"
author: W. Joel Schneider
title-slide-attributes:
    data-background-image: tintedrainbow.svg
    data-background-size: contain
    data-background-position: right
    data-background-opacity: "1"
format: 
  revealjs:
    self-contained: false
    css: "schneirographs.css"
    mainfont: Cormorant
    theme: schneirographs.scss
    header: false
    center-title-slide: false
---

## Some Strata Still Remember the Sun {.no-footer data-background-image="emu_woman_sunset.svg" data-background-size="contain" data-background-position="right"}
